reason: AP penetration 80.5 mm was below effective armor 87.234 mm.
notes: Range-adjusted AP penetration: 80.5 mm at 950 m from a base 109 mm with 3 mm loss per 100 m.
Armor defeated the AP shot before any internal fragment generation.
